productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Floral Pattern  Handbag
description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality Made of synthetic leather Has a main roomy zippered compartment with organiser sleeves to hold a mobile and essentials, and an inner zippered compartment One long removable strap with metallic clasps for carrying ease and style Slightly rouched on the front and back Three metallic chains woven through two loops on the front for enhanced style Brand name embossed on the side Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
